configurations.name: Launch Current File
configurations.// Step 1: Verify tasks.json contains a: Run `tsc -p tsconfig.json` or equivalent TypeScript compilation command
configurations.// Step 2: Ensure your tsconfig.json com: If your outDir is different, replace 'dist' with your actual outDir below
configurations.// Step 3: Configure debugOutDir in work: In .vscode/settings.json, add: { "debugOutDir": "dist" } to match your tsconfig.json outDir
configurations.// ERROR HANDLING: If preLaunchTask fail: VS Code will fail with 'preLaunchTask 'tsc: build' terminated with exit code 1 or file not found'. Verify: (1) tsc runs without errors; (2) sourceMap generation is enabled in tsconfig.json; (3) outDir matches debugOutDir above.
configurations.// SOURCE MAP VALIDATION: If sourceMaps: source stepping will not work. Ensure tsconfig.json has "sourceMap": true and that tsc emits .map files to the same directory as .js files.
